subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of Days, that the sweet-scented breezes of remembrance may draw him near unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله مالک الایام لتجذبه نفحات الذکر و تقربه الی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation
